items.title: How MI5 foiled a Tesco worker's plan for mass gun attack
items.raw_content: Police say Alfie Coleman appeared to be a normal teenager but was hiding a dark plan.
items.ai_summary: MI5挫败了特斯科员工阿尔菲·科尔曼计划进行大规模枪击的阴谋，他表面看似正常。

items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.raw_content: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
items.ai_summary: 化肥公司Yara老板警告称，伊朗冲突导致的化肥短缺可能减少作物产量并推高粮价，数十亿餐饭面临风险。

items.title: Newspaper headlines: 'PM vows to act' and 'Brace for more terror attacks'
items.raw_content: The main story for many of the papers continues to be the knife attack in Golders Green on Wednesday.
items.ai_summary: 报纸头条关注戈德斯格林持刀袭击事件，首相誓言采取行动，民众担忧更多恐怖袭击。

items.title: New footage shows how Trump dinner gunman charged through security in four seconds
items.raw_content: The CCTV shows an officer draw a firearm and open fire as the suspect sprints past.
items.ai_summary: 新视频显示特朗普晚宴枪击案中，枪手在四秒内冲过安保，警察开枪射击。

items.title: Why was Mudryk given ban in secret and what happens now?
items.raw_content: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk is appealing against a four-year doping ban but why has the process been kept secret, and what happens now?
items.ai_summary: 切尔西边锋穆德里克因四年禁药禁令提出上诉，但过程保密；分析原因及后续。

items.title: Vonn still in 'survival mode' after Olympic crash
items.raw_content: American skiing great Lindsey Vonn says she is still "too emotional" to make a decision on her future career as she faces at least 18 months of recuperation.
items.ai_summary: 美国滑雪名将林赛·沃恩表示，在奥运会撞车事故后仍然“情绪化”，需要至少18个月恢复，无法决定未来。

items.title: Is Saudi Arabia's sports revolution unravelling?
items.raw_content: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf, but what does this mean for the country's other sporting investments? Dan Roan takes a closer look.
items.ai_summary: 沙特阿拉伯将撤回对LIV高尔夫数十亿美元的支持，引发对其体育投资革命是否会瓦解的疑问。

items.title: Pickleball and protests: How a Trump visit is roiling the world's largest retirement community
items.raw_content: Politics have become an increasingly thorny issue in the Villages, the world's largest retirement community.
items.ai_summary: 特朗普访问世界最大退休社区引发匹克球和抗议活动，政治问题在该社区日益尖锐。

items.title: 'So stressful' - teachers and pupils say new GCSEs are leading to burnout
items.raw_content: Unions warn teachers will quit and there are fears for pupils' wellbeing as classroom tests increase.
items.ai_summary: 教师工会警告称，新的GCSE考试导致教师和学生压力过大，担心教师辞职和学生心理健康问题。
